top_signals.title: Gold Trims Gains as Traders Weigh Iran Deal Prospects, Inflation
top_signals.summary: Gold pared gains as investors assessed the prospects of a US-Iran ceasefire deal, while also weighing the odds that elevated energy prices will prompt central banks to keep interest rates higher for longer.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Elon Musk loses court battle against Sam Altman and OpenAI after 3-week trial
top_signals.summary: The jury ruled in favor of Sam Altman and OpenAI in their dramatic court battle with Elon Musk.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
